scenarios.rationale: The operating system (RHEL 7) is assessed as EOL, so patching or upgrading is recommended.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch to standard Linux Operating System
scenarios.rationale: The application already runs on a standard Linux distribution (RHEL 7).
The current stack (RHEL 7, Java 11, Websphere 7.0) is legacy and would make an ARM migration high risk.
The application uses Websphere 7.0, which is a legacy-style middleware component worth evaluating for replacement.

scenarios.scenario_name: Application Migration to Cloud Infrastructure (Lift & Shift)
scenarios.rationale: The application is already deployed in AWS.
The legacy stack (RHEL 7, Java 11) makes near-term containerization difficult.
The solution type (3rd party software) suggests packaged software, which limits custom refactoring opportunities.
The database version for Amazon RDS MySQL is not covered by the supplied lifecycle rules.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch DB Engine to open-source database solution
scenarios.rationale: The application already uses an open-source or open-source-based database engine (Amazon RDS MySQL).
The technology assessment found 1 EOL and 1 outdated component(s).
